title: Now You See It
short_description: Memorize the grid, then Professor Peekaboo throws a blanket over it and changes one thing — spot what's different when it lifts.
description: Professor Peekaboo shows you a grid of things to memorize, then throws a blanket over it and secretly swaps ONE item. When the blanket lifts, tap what's different! It's a fast, replayable workout for visual memory and attention to detail, and faster spots score more. Grade bands ramp from a 3×3 grid with a generous peek, to a quicker 4×4, to a blink-and-you-miss-it 5×5 for grade 4–5. A free online visual memory and spot-the-difference game for kids in grades 1–5, with speed bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Watch the grid, then tap the single item that changed when it reappears.
